title: Argentinian Beef Stew
description: Hearty and flavorful beef stew from Argentina, slow-cooked with tender meat and vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add gobo and burdock and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
Add stew and stir to combine.
Return beef to pot and add salt and pepper to taste.
Bring to a boil, cover pot, and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
